data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. HELLFIGHTER returned from a spell last time and finished sixth of 13 at Muswellbrook over 1280m. Fitter for that last run and having placed second when produced second-up in the past will be well supported to take this race out. 9. DON'T TELL POLLY finished fifth last time out over 1300m at Hawkesbury when resuming from a spell. Racing over a longer trip in a fitter state has each-way claims. 10. LET'S BE HONEST resumed from a spell last start over 1250m at this track and finished a close fourth of nine. Racing fitter is worth serious consideration. 8. ZAMAZING has recorded two minor placings from three runs this prep, including last start when finishing second of seven over 1400m at Kembla Grange when well fancied. Well placed and can go one better. Include in combinations.","runners":[6,9,10,8],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: NEWCASTLE-R4-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
